questions.question_text: You have caught up with the moped and there are no road users behind you. How will you continue?

answers.1: I move out towards the broken line in order to overtake the moped.
answers.2: I overtake the moped immediately.
answers.3: I reduce my speed.
answers.4: I remain behind the moped for the time being.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 40 km/h and are continuing straight ahead through the intersection. How will you continue?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of whether the moped rider is holding back.
answers.2: I continue across the intersection at an unchanged speed of approximately 40 km/h.
answers.3: I move my foot over to the brake pedal.
answers.4: I am ready to hold back for vehicles approaching from the right side of the intersection.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 40 km/h and are continuing straight ahead through the intersection. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 40 km/h.
answers.2: I stop before the crosswalk.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful of the traffic ahead.
answers.4: I pull over to the right side of the traffic lane.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 50 km/h when, in the rear view mirror, you suddenly notice an emergency vehicle responding to a call. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 50 km/h.
answers.2: I reduce my speed and keep to the left.
answers.3: I reduce my speed, stop if necessary and let the emergency vehicle pass.

questions.question_text: What must you be particularly mindful of in this situation?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the shape of the road.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful that I must change to the far left lane as soon as possible.
answers.3: I proceed in accordance with the merge rule.
answers.4: I proceed in accordance with the rule for changing traffic lanes.

questions.question_text: You wish to overtake the vehicle in front, which is driving slowly. How do you proceed?

answers.1: I give a flashing light signal with my high-beam headlights.
answers.2: I overtake the vehicle in front.
answers.3: I move my foot over to the brake pedal.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 50 km/h. There are no road users behind you. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 50 km/h.
answers.2: I reduce my speed.
answers.3: I stop before the crosswalk.

questions.question_text: You intend to turn right at the intersection, just like the vehicle in front. It has stopped. What must you be particularly mindful of?

answers.1: I have a duty to give way to all traffic at the intersection.
answers.2: I stop for traffic from both sides of the intersection.
answers.3: I have a duty to stop at the stopline before driving out into the intersection.
answers.4: If I am able to follow the vehicle in front, I am permitted to do so without stopping at the stopline.

questions.question_text: The passenger car on the left has stopped. You are to continue straight ahead. How will you continue?

answers.1: I proceed slowly.
answers.2: I stop.
answers.3: I pull over as far as possible to the right of the roadway.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 30 to 40 km/h, the same as the vehicle in front. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 30 to 40 km/h.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful of the shape of the road ahead.
answers.3: I brake gently.

questions.question_text: You are required to continue straight ahead. How will you continue?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the traffic sign.
answers.2: I continue slowly straight ahead on the road.
answers.3: I stop.
answers.4: I reverse or turn around and find another route.

questions.question_text: You have caught up with the passenger car. It is driving at approximately 50 km/h. How will you continue?

answers.1: I reduce my speed.
answers.2: I give a flashing light signal with my high-beam headlights.
answers.3: I increase my speed and overtake the passenger car immediately.
answers.4: I remain behind the passenger car for the time being.

questions.question_text: You need to pass through this town. How will you continue?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the traffic lights.
answers.2: I continue straight ahead into the intersection.
answers.3: I turn either right or left at the intersection.
answers.4: Entry is prohibited for motor vehicles here.

questions.question_text: What must you be particularly mindful of in this situation?

answers.1: I have a duty to give way to all traffic.
answers.2: There is a priority to the right rule at this T-junction.
answers.3: I can count on the vehicle from the left holding back.
answers.4: I hold back for the sake of safety.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 40 km/h and are continuing straight ahead through the intersection. How will you continue?

answers.1: I count on the bicyclist holding back.
answers.2: I increase my speed.
answers.3: I hold back for the bicyclist.
answers.4: I look to see what is happening on both sides before I drive into the intersection.

questions.question_text: You are driving at 40 km/h and are continuing straight ahead through the intersection. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue across the intersection at an unchanged speed of approximately 40 km/h.
answers.2: I count on the bicyclist from the right side holding back for me.
answers.3: I hold back for the bicyclist.
answers.4: I look to see what is happening on both sides before I drive into the intersection.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 40 km/h, the same as the vehicle in front. You are to continue straight ahead. How do you proceed?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 40 km/h.
answers.2: I follow the vehicle in front.
answers.3: I stop before the crosswalk.

questions.question_text: You intend to turn right at this intersection. How will you proceed?

answers.1: I hold back at the yield line if there is traffic crossing.
answers.2: I turn right if the lane is clear of traffic.
answers.3: I must turn left at this intersection instead.

questions.question_text: You intend to turn right here at the intersection. There are no bicyclists or pedestrians behind you on the bicycle path. How will you continue?

answers.1: I follow the bicyclist who is turning.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful of the traffic lights.
answers.3: I stop before the crosswalk on the side road.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 80 km/h and are continuing straight ahead. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 80 km/h.
answers.2: I increase my speed from approximately 100 to 130 km/h.
answers.3: I change to the right traffic lane immediately.
answers.4: I remain in my own traffic lane for the time being.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 80 km/h and are about to enter the motorway. How do you proceed?

answers.1: I drive onto the motorway immediately.
answers.2: I turn my head to check what is happening behind me.
answers.3: I enter when the roadway behind me is clear.
answers.4: I proceed in accordance with the merge rule.

questions.question_text: You have stepped out of the red passenger car. According to the legal provisions, which of the following applies here?

answers.1: I am permitted to park the passenger car here.
answers.2: I am permitted to stop the passenger car here for 2 to 3 minutes.
answers.3: Stopping is prohibited here.

questions.question_text: You have stepped out of the red passenger car. According to the legal provisions, which of the following applies here?

answers.1: I am permitted to park the passenger car here.
answers.2: I am permitted to stop the passenger car here for 2 to 3 minutes.
answers.3: Stopping and parking are both prohibited on this side of the road.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 30 km/h. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 30 km/h.
answers.2: I move my foot over to the brake pedal.
answers.3: I pull over as far as possible to the right of the roadway.
answers.4: I warn the young children with a short horn signal.

questions.question_text: Which speed limit must you be particularly mindful of here?

answers.1: The maximum speed limit of 50 km/h begins here.
answers.2: The maximum speed limit of 50 km/h ends here.
answers.3: The maximum speed limit of 80 km/h begins here.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful of the traffic sign.
